cube.description: Text-to-image generation: prompts, checkpoint, sampler, size, VAE, prompt encoding, LoRA scheduling, and color controls.

catalog_entry.description: Text-to-image generation: prompts, checkpoint, sampler, size, VAE, prompt encoding, LoRA scheduling, and color controls.

cube_buffer.description: Text-to-image generation: prompts, checkpoint, sampler, size, VAE, prompt encoding, LoRA scheduling, and color controls.

cube.description: Diffusion upscaling: upscale an input image, resize it to target constraints, then refine it with image-to-image diffusion.

catalog_entry.description: Diffusion upscaling: upscale an input image, resize it to target constraints, then refine it with image-to-image diffusion.

cube_buffer.description: Diffusion upscaling: upscale an input image, resize it to target constraints, then refine it with image-to-image diffusion.

cube.description: Detector-guided detailing: detect image regions with an Ultralytics model, then inpaint and refine them with prompt-guided diffusion.

catalog_entry.description: Detector-guided detailing: detect image regions with an Ultralytics model, then inpaint and refine them with prompt-guided diffusion.

cube_buffer.description: Detector-guided detailing: detect image regions with an Ultralytics model, then inpaint and refine them with prompt-guided diffusion.

EmptyLatentImage.description: Create a new batch of empty latent images to be denoised via sampling.

batch_size.tooltip: The number of latent images in the batch.

height.tooltip: The height of the latent images in pixels.

width.tooltip: The width of the latent images in pixels.

EmptyLatentImage.name: EmptyLatentImage
output_tooltips: The empty latent image batch.

Mahiro.description: Modify the guidance to scale more on the 'direction' of the positive prompt rather than the difference between the negative prompt.
Mahiro.name: Mahiro

SimpleSyrup.DetailSEGSByScaleFactor.description: Details SEGS regions using crop scale factor sizing.

cfg.tooltip: Prompt guidance strength. Higher values follow the positive prompt more strongly but can look overcooked.

clamp_size.tooltip: Maximum crop size in pixels after scaling. Use 0 to leave crop size unclamped.

denoise.tooltip: Sampling strength. Lower values preserve the input more; higher values allow larger changes.

feather.tooltip: Mask edge softness in pixels. Higher values blend edits more gently into the image.

image.tooltip: Source image containing the regions to improve. Detailed crops are blended back into this image.

model.tooltip: Diffusion model used to resample each detailed crop.

negative.tooltip: Negative conditioning for detailing. A conditioning batch is matched to SEGS order.

noise_mask.tooltip: Limit sampling noise to the selected mask area so unchanged pixels stay more stable.

noise_mask_feather.tooltip: Noise mask edge softness in pixels. Higher values make the sampled area fade out more gradually.

positive.tooltip: Positive conditioning for detailing. A conditioning batch is matched to SEGS order.

sampler_name.tooltip: Sampling algorithm. It affects the image's look, speed, and stability.

scale_factor.tooltip: Crop enlargement multiplier. Larger values give the sampler more detail room but use more memory.

scheduler.tooltip: Noise schedule used during sampling. It changes how quickly structure and detail form.

seed.tooltip: Seed used to create sampling noise. Reusing it with matching settings makes results repeatable.

segs.tooltip: SEGS regions that choose which parts of the image are detailed.

steps.tooltip: Number of denoising steps. More steps can add refinement but take longer.

tiled_decode.tooltip: Decode large crops in tiles. This lowers memory use but is usually slower.

tiled_encode.tooltip: Encode large crops in tiles. This lowers memory use but is usually slower.

upscale_method.tooltip: Resize method for scaled crops. Sharper methods preserve detail but can show more ringing.

vae.tooltip: VAE used to encode crops to latents and decode the edited crops.

SimpleSyrup.DetailSEGSByScaleFactor.name: SimpleSyrup.DetailSEGSByScaleFactor
output_tooltips: Image with the detailed regions blended back into place.

SimpleSyrup.DetectSEGSWithUltralytics.description: Detects regions with an Ultralytics model and returns individual SEGS, combined SEGS when requested, and a combined mask.

bbox_dilation.tooltip: Grow or shrink initial detection boxes in pixels before masks are built.

combine_segs.tooltip: Return one unioned SEGS region instead of separate regions.

confidence_threshold.tooltip: Minimum detection confidence required to keep a region.

crop_factor.tooltip: How much context to include around each detected region. Use 0 for the full image; higher values make larger SEG crops.

detector_model.tooltip: Ultralytics model that finds boxes or masks in the input image.

image.tooltip: Image to search for detectable regions.

keep_by.tooltip: Choose how regions are ranked when Keep Only is greater than 0.

keep_only.tooltip: Keep only this many detected regions after threshold filtering. Use 0 to keep all regions.

post_dilation.tooltip: Grow or shrink each final cropped SEG mask in pixels after detection and refinement.

size_threshold.tooltip: Discard regions whose detected box is smaller than this many pixels wide or tall.

sort_order.tooltip: Order the returned SEGS before output and before the combined mask is built.

sub_dilation.tooltip: Grow or shrink the segmentation refinement mask in pixels before it is applied to detected regions.

SimpleSyrup.DetectSEGSWithUltralytics.name: SimpleSyrup.DetectSEGSWithUltralytics
output_tooltips: Detected regions as separate or combined SEGS based on combine_segs.
Combined detected area as a standard ComfyUI mask.

SimpleSyrup.KSamplerExtras.description: Denoises latents with extended sampler and scheduler options for compatible workflows.

cfg.tooltip: Prompt guidance strength. Higher values follow the positive prompt more strongly but can look overcooked.

denoise.tooltip: Sampling strength. Lower values preserve the input more; higher values allow larger changes.

latent_image.tooltip: Latent input whose samples will be denoised.

model.tooltip: Diffusion model used to denoise the input latent.

negative.tooltip: Negative conditioning that guides what the sampler should avoid.

positive.tooltip: Positive conditioning that guides what the sampler should add.

sampler_name.tooltip: Sampling algorithm. It affects the image's look, speed, and stability.

scheduler.tooltip: Noise schedule used during sampling. It changes how quickly structure and detail form.

seed.tooltip: Seed used to create sampling noise. Reusing it with matching settings makes results repeatable.

steps.tooltip: Number of denoising steps. More steps can add refinement but take longer.

SimpleSyrup.KSamplerExtras.name: SimpleSyrup.KSamplerExtras
output_tooltips: Denoised latent for VAE decode or more latent processing.

SimpleSyrup.LoadUltralyticsModel.description: Loads an Ultralytics model for detection and SEGS workflows.

model_name.tooltip: Ultralytics model file in the ComfyUI models folder.

SimpleSyrup.LoadUltralyticsModel.name: SimpleSyrup.LoadUltralyticsModel
output_tooltips: Detector model for SimpleSyrup SEGS detection nodes.
Bounding-box detector output for nodes that expect a bbox detector.
Segmentation detector output for nodes that expect a mask-capable detector.

SimpleSyrup.PromptEncodeStyle.description: Builds a Prompt Control STYLE tag from an encode-style selection.

encode_style.tooltip: Prompt Control encoding style to write into the STYLE tag.

SimpleSyrup.PromptEncodeStyle.name: SimpleSyrup.PromptEncodeStyle
output_tooltips: Prompt Control STYLE tag text for prompt encoding workflows.

SimpleSyrup.ResizeImageToTarget.description: Resize image batches to a target size with selectable aspect handling, sampler, and CPU/GPU processor.

mask.tooltip: Optional mask to resize with the image batch.

crop_position.tooltip: Anchor used when crop mode trims overflow from the resized image.

divisible_by.tooltip: Round final dimensions to a multiple of this value for model or latent-size compatibility.

height.tooltip: Target height in pixels before divisibility rounding.

image.tooltip: Image batch to resize to the target dimensions.

max_batch_size.tooltip: Maximum images resized at once. Lower values reduce memory use; 0 processes the full batch together.

pad_color.tooltip: RGB color used to fill empty space in pad mode.

precision.tooltip: Math precision for resizing. Lower precision can save memory but may slightly change results.

processor.tooltip: Processor used for resizing. GPU is usually faster; CPU can reduce GPU memory pressure.

resize_mode.tooltip: How aspect ratio is handled. Stretch fills exactly, crop trims overflow, and pad fills empty space.

sampling.tooltip: Resize filter. Sharper filters preserve detail but can show more ringing.

sinc_window.tooltip: Lanczos window size. Higher values can look sharper but may add ringing.

width.tooltip: Target width in pixels before divisibility rounding.

SimpleSyrup.ResizeImageToTarget.name: SimpleSyrup.ResizeImageToTarget
output_tooltips: Resized image batch after aspect-ratio handling and divisibility rounding.
Final image width in pixels.
Final image height in pixels.
Resized mask aligned to the output image size.

SimpleSyrup.ScaleFactor.description: Provides a bounded multiplier for scaling.

value.tooltip: Scaling multiplier. 1.0 keeps the target at its current size; larger values scale it up, with a maximum of 5.0x.

SimpleSyrup.ScaleFactor.name: SimpleSyrup.ScaleFactor
output_tooltips: Multiplier used to scale a connected target.

SimpleSyrup.SimpleLoadCheckpoint.description: Loads a checkpoint and optionally replaces its VAE.

ckpt_name.tooltip: Checkpoint file to load. This supplies the base MODEL, CLIP, and checkpoint VAE for the workflow.

clip_skip.tooltip: Use ComfyUI's clip-skip behavior for prompt encoding. Enable it for models that expect the next-to-last CLIP layer.

vae_name.tooltip: VAE to output with the checkpoint. Use the checkpoint VAE to keep the model's own decoder, or choose another VAE to replace it.

SimpleSyrup.SimpleLoadCheckpoint.name: SimpleSyrup.SimpleLoadCheckpoint
output_tooltips: Loaded diffusion model for downstream MODEL inputs.
Loaded text encoder for downstream CLIP inputs.
Loaded VAE used to encode images to latents and decode latents to images.

SimpleSyrup.VAEDecodeOptions.description: Decodes latents to images with selectable normal or tiled VAE execution.

overlap.tooltip: Overlap between tiles in pixels. Larger overlaps reduce seams but do more work.

samples.tooltip: Latent samples to decode into an image.

temporal_overlap.tooltip: For video VAEs, number of overlapping frames between temporal tiles.

temporal_size.tooltip: For video VAEs, number of frames to decode at once.

tile_size.tooltip: Tile size in pixels. Larger tiles are faster but use more memory.

use_tiling.tooltip: Use ComfyUI's tiled VAE node. Disabled uses normal ComfyUI VAE behavior, including its automatic tiled retry after out-of-memory.

vae.tooltip: VAE used for the selected encode or decode operation.

SimpleSyrup.VAEDecodeOptions.name: SimpleSyrup.VAEDecodeOptions
output_tooltips: Image produced by ComfyUI's selected VAE decode node.

SimpleSyrup.VAEEncodeOptions.description: Encodes images to latent space with selectable normal or tiled VAE execution.

overlap.tooltip: Overlap between tiles in pixels. Larger overlaps reduce seams but do more work.

pixels.tooltip: Image to encode into latent space.

temporal_overlap.tooltip: For video VAEs, number of overlapping frames between temporal tiles.

temporal_size.tooltip: For video VAEs, number of frames to encode at once.

tile_size.tooltip: Tile size in pixels. Larger tiles are faster but use more memory.

use_tiling.tooltip: Use ComfyUI's tiled VAE node. Disabled uses normal ComfyUI VAE behavior, including its automatic tiled retry after out-of-memory.

vae.tooltip: VAE used for the selected encode or decode operation.

SimpleSyrup.VAEEncodeOptions.name: SimpleSyrup.VAEEncodeOptions
output_tooltips: Latent produced by ComfyUI's selected VAE encode node.

VAEDecode.description: Decodes latent images back into pixel space images.

vae.tooltip: The VAE model used for decoding the latent.

VAEDecode.name: VAEDecode
output_tooltips: The decoded image.
